items.summary: Qlib是一个面向人工智能的量化投资平台，旨在利用人工智能技术赋能量化研究，从探索想法到实现产品。 Qlib 支持多种 ML 建模范例，包括监督学习、市场动态建模和 RL，现在配备了 https://github.com/microsoft/RD-Agent 来自动化研发过程。

Qlib supports diverse ML modeling paradigms, including supervised learning, market dynamics modeling, and RL, and is now equipped with https://github.com/microsoft/RD-Agent to automate R&D process.

It makes implementing RAG, tool calling (including support for MCP), and agents easy. LangChain4j integrates seamlessly with various enterprise Java frameworks.
